text.tspan: Uses LRU cache for parsed data
• Lazy loading: Parse visible/expanded nodes only → 500MB+ files stay responsive
• Dual query modes: memmem substring scan + JSONPath walkers share highlight pipeline
• Precomputed RowHighlights: LayoutJob paints ranges, no per-frame substring scanning
• Fragment caps & Arc highlight maps: bounded allocations reused across UI
• Plugin system: sandboxed WebAssembly components (loaders, viewers, data sources) compose the thoth-plugin-sdk RenderNode UI the host renders
